name: Lisas' Perfect Deviled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon fresh chives, snipped or dried
recipeInstructions:
1. For perfect eggs with no green center (caused by over cooking), place 12 eggs in a large pan and cover with at least 3 inches of water. Bring the water to a boil.
2. Do not use hot water. Place the pan on burner over medium-high heat and start timing for exactly 20 minutes. For any amount of eggs, follow the same steps.
3. When the eggs begin to boil hard, turn the heat down to medium.
4. Crack the eggs while they are still hot so the shells easily slip off.
5. Slice the eggs in half lengthwise and scrape out the yolks into a mixing bowl.
6. Blend together the remaining ingredients well.
7. Fill the egg halves with the mixture. Sprinkle additional paprika on top, if desired, and chill well before serving.
